items.name: Potato Bowl
items.description: A hearty breakfast bowl of cubed Irish potatoes, sauteed vegetables, pickled onions and eggs, bound with creamy yaji mayo.

items.name: French Toast
items.description: Thick slices of bread dipped in cinnamon-spiced custard, grilled to perfection, and topped with banana slices, crushed oreo cookies and caramel and milk syrup.

items.name: English Breakfast
items.description: A classic platter featuring eggs, sausages, crispy bacon, baked beans, grilled tomatoes, mushrooms, and toast served with your choice of juice, coffee or tea.

items.name: Pancakes
items.description: Fluffy stacks of pancakes served with cream, syrup, and fresh exotic fruits compote.

items.name: Croissant breakfast Sandwich
items.description: fresh Croissant with Egg, greens, tomato, bacon or ham, cheese and mayo mix for a satisfying start to the day.

items.name: Classic Beef Burger
items.description: A juicy beef patty served with lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, pickled onions, crispy potato chips and a signature sauce.

items.name: Chicken Burger
items.description: Smoked chicken patty served with lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, pickled onions, crispy potato chips and a signature sauce.

items.name: Open-Faced Chicken Sandwich
items.description: Grilled chicken on lean bread, with cream, onions and greens with a side of crispy potato chips..

items.name: Tuna sandwich
items.description: Lean toast topped with tuna, lettuce, labneh, onions, tomatoes and dill with a side of rispy potatoes. (GLUTEN, FISH, DAIRY)

items.name: Samosa
items.description: Light and flaky pastry pockets filled with spiced meat and vegetables, served with sweetened chilli sauce.

items.name: Vegetable Spring rolls
items.description: Light and flaky pastry pockets filled with vegetables, served with sweetened chilli sauce.

items.name: Chicken Wings
items.description: Juicy, tender chicken wings coated in your choice of BBQ, spicy, or honey glaze and served with a side of crispy potatoes and slaw.

items.name: Fish and Chips
items.description: Classic battered white fish paired with potato fries and ranch sauce for a satisfying crunch.

items.name: Chicken Kebab
items.description: Grilled chicken skewers wrapped in flatbread with veggies and mayo sauce.

items.name: Bao Buns
items.description: Asian style steamed buns with pulled beef and vegetables and spicy dipping sauce.

items.name: Minced Beef Tacos
items.description: Hard or soft shell tacos and minced beef with vegetable relish, topped with our house taco salad. (GLUTEN, SPICY, SOY)

items.name: Goat Pepper Soup
items.description: A fiery West African soup with tender goat meat simmered in spicy broth.

items.name: Chicken Pepper Soup
items.description: A comforting bowl of spiced chicken broth with succulent chicken pieces.

items.name: Fish Pepper Soup
items.description: Fresh fish in a hot, aromatic broth with herbs and spices.

items.name: Waldorf Salad
items.description: Crisp apples, celery, walnuts, and grapes in a creamy mayo dressing over fresh greens.

items.name: Greek Salad
items.description: A refreshing mix of cucumbers, tomatoes, olives, Feta cheese, and fresh oregano olive oil vinaigrette.

items.name: Tuna Salad
items.description: Tuna pieces on a bed of greens with onions, croutons, orange and a tangy balsamic vinaigrette. (FISH)

items.name: Roasted Chicken Salad
items.description: Tender roasted chicken, mixed greens, nuts, coconut, grapes, tomatoes, dried fruit and mayo dressing.

items.name: Farmhouse Salad
items.description: A rustic medley of fresh vegetables, quinoa, red kidney beans, tomatoes, sweet corn, smoked beef, and a creamy dressing.

items.name: Alfredo Pasta
items.description: Creamy penne pasta tossed in buttery and creamy sauce, finished with a sprinkle of parsley, cheese and a protein of choice.

items.name: Simmer Special Pasta
items.description: Asian style tossed pasta with, fresh herbs, seasonal vegetables and mixed protein.

items.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
items.description: Classic Italian spaghetti topped with slow-cooked minced beef in a rich marinara sauce and topped with parmesan cheese with crusty bread..

items.name: Seafood Pasta
items.description: Mixed seafood (shrimp, calamari, mussels or clams) tossed in a decadent butter and white wine sauce.

items.name: Veggie Pasta
items.description: spaghettini Pasta and fresh vegetables in olive oil, parsley and garlic.

items.name: Penne Arabiatta
items.description: Penne pasta in a spicy tomato sauce with garlic and chili flakes, garnished with cheese shavings and toasted bread.

items.name: Beef Teriyaki Pasta
items.description: Stir-fried pasta with teriyaki-marinated beef, vegetables, and sesame seeds.

items.name: Seafood Rice
items.description: Fragrant rice mixed with shrimp, calamari, and fish, lightly spiced.

items.name: Carnivore Rice
items.description: A meat lover's delight with spiced rice, kidney beans, shredded beef, and chunks of chicken.

items.name: Spicy Half Chicken
items.description: Spicy marinated half chicken marinated in our house sauce and grilled to perfection.

items.name: Honey Lemon Chicken
items.description: Juicy chicken glazed with honey and a hint of lemon zest.

items.name: Sizzling Smoked Chicken Sauce
items.description: Smoked chicken in a rich, spicy sauce with herbs and vegetables.

items.name: Coconut Curry Chicken
items.description: Chicken simmered in a creamy coconut curry sauce.

items.name: Veggie chicken Stir Fry
items.description: Sauteed chicken strips with broccoli, cauliflower, bell peppers and carrots in a soy-based sauce.

items.name: Game Fowl Stew
items.description: Guinea fowl braised in red wine with herbs and root vegetables.

items.name: Sizzling Smoked Beef Sauce
items.description: Tender smoked beef chunks simmered in a flavorful, spicy sauce.

items.name: Beef Ribs
items.description: Slow-cooked beef ribs glazed with a tangy BBQ sauce.

items.name: Peppered Beef
items.description: Spicy sauteed beef strips with onions and bell peppers.

items.name: Crispy chilli beef
items.description: Tender beef stir-fried in a sweet and savory soy-based sauce.

items.name: Lamb stew
items.description: Lamb slow-cooked in tomato and red wine with vegetables.

items.name: Lamb Chops
items.description: Grilled lamb chops crusted with breadcrumbs, cheese and herbs.

items.name: Veggie Beef Stir Fry
items.description: Sautéed beef strips with broccoli, cauliflower, and carrots in a soy-based sauce.

items.name: Coconut lamb curry
items.description: Lamb meat simmered in a creamy coconut curry sauce.

note: Please note all African soups are served a choice of EBA, SEMO or POUNDO YAM and also with protein of choice.

items.name: Native Rice
items.description: Flavored rice cooked with local spices, palm oil, and vegetables.

items.name: Ofada Rice
items.description: Locally grown rice served with a spicy Ayamase sauce.

items.name: Fisherman Soup
items.description: Traditional seafood soup with fish, prawns, and crab in a rich broth.

items.name: Vegetable Soup
items.description: Nutritious soup with assorted leafy greens and meat.

items.name: Okro Soup
items.description: Slimy, flavorful soup made with fresh okra and proteins.

items.name: Egusi Soup
items.description: A savory melon seed soup cooked with vegetables and assorted meats. (served with choice of EBA, SEMO or POUNDO YAM and protein of choice)

items.name: Minced beef
items.description: Crispy golden fries loaded with minced beef BBQ topped with melted cheese and a variety of bold flavours.

items.name: BBQ chicken
items.description: Crispy golden fries loaded with your choice of BBQ chicken, topped with melted cheese and a variety of bold flavours.

items.name: Sizzling Brownies and Cream
items.description: Warm, gooey brownies served on a hot plate with a dollop of fresh cream.

items.name: Rum buns
items.description: A dramatic dessert of soaked rum baba cake and ice cream.

items.name: Smoked Malva Pudding
items.description: A rich, spongy pudding with a unique smoky flavor, served with custard.

items.name: Margherita
items.description: Classic mozzarella & tomato blend.

items.name: BBQ Beef
items.description: Smoky, tender beef with rich BBQ sauce.

items.name: BBQ Chicken
items.description: Succulent grilled chicken in tangy BBQ glaze.

items.name: Pepperoni
items.description: Spiced beef pepperoni with cheesy goodness.

items.name: Simmer supreme Feast
items.description: A delightful fusion of chicken, beef and pepperoni toppings.

items.name: Grilled Prawns
items.description: Juicy prawns marinated in garlic and herbs, grilled to perfection served with a side of slaw.

items.name: Whole Grilled Fish
items.description: Fresh whole fish seasoned with herbs and spices, grilled and served with fries or plantain, coleslaw and lemon.

items.name: Seafood sauce
items.description: Shrimps, fish bits, calamari and pineapple chunks, tossed in a pineapple-infused sweet and sour sauce.

items.name: Fish fillet
items.description: Pan-seared Sole fish with garlic butter and herbs and served with a side of slaw.

items.name: Jollof Rice
items.description: Fragrant West African rice cooked in a spicy tomato base.

items.name: Simmer Fried Rice
items.description: Stir-fried rice with vegetables, eggs, and a hint of soy sauce.

items.name: Herbed Rice
items.description: Steamed rice infused with fresh herbs and butter.

items.name: Coconut Rice
items.description: Creamy rice cooked with coconut milk and aromatic spices.

items.name: Yam Fingers
items.description: Deep-fried yam strips served with a spicy dipping sauce.

items.name: Mashed Potatoes
items.description: Creamy mashed potatoes blended with butter and cream.

items.name: Steamed Rice
items.description: Plain steamed buttery basmati rice.

items.name: Potato wedges
items.description: Well seasoned Pan seared potato wedges
